sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81686" key="perimasteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιμαστεύω</orth>, <sense id="n81686.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go round and visit</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πολλὰ ἔθνη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
